title: The Misadventures of Merlin Jones
writer: Bill Walsh, Alfred Lewis Levitt, Helen Levitt
actors: Tommy Kirk, Annette Funicello, Leon Ames
plot: Merlin Jones, resident genius at Midvale College, inadvertently gets into a string of scrapes, both in college and with the law-much to the distress of his long-suffering girlfriend and the local district judge.
